treatment_information.dosage_or_details: 60 mg BID, increased from previous dosage
treatment_information.treatment_response: Minimal change in symptoms, adjusted dosage due to dizziness

treatment_timeline.event: Patient treated with Lasix 80 mg IV
Torsemide dosage increased to 60 mg BID
Admitted to heart failure service for further management
Discharged home with instructions and adjusted medication

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow up with arranged appointments; weigh self daily
patient_outcome.complications: Dizziness due to excessive Lasix medication
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Stable heart disease, no changes seen on echo
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Improvement noted with medication to remove fluid
